text.more:
This retweet network graph shows "bridge users" or  "connectors". These are the users, who contribute to cross-community information amplification. 
In an information diffusion graph, these users act as major amplifiers of content and information.
text.intro:
A retweet network graph that shows information dissemination during the 2026 LPG Crisis in India. 
Node size is proportional to the outdegree of nodes or in other words,  the more a user retweets multiple posts , the more the outdegree value increase and thus, the node size.
text.title: Retweet Network Graph (based on Outdegree)
